service.name: Cloudflare Workers API
service.description_for_ai: Serverless edge computing platform. Deploy JavaScript/Rust/Python at 300+ locations worldwide. 0ms cold start. 100K requests/day free. Use for edge APIs, proxies, middleware, serverless functions.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Deploy or update a Cloudflare Worker script to the edge network. Worker runs at 300+ global locations with zero cold starts.

account_id.description: Your Cloudflare Account ID from dashboard.cloudflare.com → right sidebar

script_name.description: Worker script name (URL-safe, unique per account). Used as subdomain: {name}.{subdomain}.workers.dev

script_content.description: JavaScript/TypeScript Worker code as string. Must export default handler: export default { fetch(request, env) { return new Response('Hello') } }

bindings.description: Resource bindings: [{type: 'kv_namespace', name: 'MY_KV', namespace_id: '...'}, {type: 'r2_bucket', name: 'MY_BUCKET', bucket_name: '...'}]

capabilities.description_for_ai: Store a key-value pair in Cloudflare KV namespace. KV is globally distributed, eventually consistent storage for config, sessions, content.

namespace_id.description: KV Namespace ID from dashboard or /storage/kv/namespaces API

key.description: Key name (up to 512 bytes, no special chars)

value.description: Value to store (up to 25MB, stored as string)

expiration_ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds. Key auto-deletes after this time. Min 60 seconds.

expiration.description: Unix timestamp when key expires. Alternative to expiration_ttl.
